entity.label: Maarath
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Desolation, a place in the mountains of Judah (Josh. 15:59), probably the modern village Beit Ummar, 6 miles north of Hebron.

nodes.label: Maarath
nodes.description: Desolation, a place in the mountains of Judah (Josh. 15:59), probably the modern village Beit Ummar, 6 miles north of Hebron.

verses.text: And Maarath, and Bethanoth, and Eltekon; six cities with their villages:
